scripts.build: npm run build -w narrarium && npm run build -w narrarium-sdk && npm run build -w narrarium-mcp-server && npm run build -w create-narrarium-book && npm run build -w narrarium-astro-reader
scripts.pack:all: npm pack --dry-run -w narrarium && npm pack --dry-run -w narrarium-sdk && npm pack --dry-run -w narrarium-mcp-server && npm pack --dry-run -w narrarium-astro-reader && npm pack --dry-run -w create-narrarium-book
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run validate && npm run test && npm run pack:all
scripts.test: npm run test -w narrarium && npm run test -w narrarium-sdk && npm run test -w narrarium-mcp-server && npm run test -w create-narrarium-book && npm run test -w narrarium-astro-reader
scripts.validate: npm run validate -w narrarium --if-present && npm run validate -w narrarium-sdk --if-present
